observations.label: Decomposition Requirement
observations.description: The pipeline must produce at least one observation of each primitive type
observations.evidence: The pipeline must always produce at least one observation of each primitive type that appears in the content.

observations.label: Fixture Purpose
observations.description: The fixture validates the full canonical pipeline
observations.evidence: The fixture validates that the full canonical pipeline processes structured markdown with:

observations.label: Ingestion Process
observations.description: The generic ingestion orchestrator separates source from pipeline
observations.evidence: Source.read() → perceive → interpret → decompose → map → persist → query

observations.label: Design Rationale
observations.description: The full design rationale for the ingestion orchestrator
observations.evidence: See [[ingestion_orchestrator_v1_design]] for the full design rationale.

observations.label: Fixture Status
observations.description: The fixture is not real operational content
observations.evidence: It is not real operational content. It exists solely to validate the pipeline contract shapes in automated tests.

observations.label: Fixture Immutability
observations.description: The fixture must remain unchanged after creation
observations.evidence: The fixture must remain unchanged after creation.

observations.label: Ingestion Orchestrator Goal
observations.description: Validate the pipeline contract shapes in automated tests
observations.evidence: It exists solely to validate the pipeline contract shapes in automated tests.

observations.label: Nonce Signal
observations.description: The nonce string is used for query-back
observations.evidence: The nonce string XQVR7-ZEPHYR-CANARY-9F3K appears nowhere else in the repository and must be retrievable via query-back.

observations.label: Ingestion Outcome
observations.description: The orchestrator produces a typed artifact at each stage
observations.evidence: Each stage produces a typed artifact.

observations.label: Fixture Creation Time
observations.evidence: This fixture was created on 2026-05-12 for ingestion-orchestrator-1.

relationships.description: The decomposition requirement constrains the fixture's immutability
The ingestion process produces a signal at each stage
The fixture's purpose may conflict with its status as not being real operational content
The design rationale enables the ingestion outcome
The fixture's status requires the ingestion orchestrator goal
